reason_thou: The debugging session has encountered repeated segmentation faults when attempting to evaluate expressions related to `FC1.Preheader` and its parent relationships. This suggests that there may be an issue with the integrity of the `FC1.Preheader` object or its associated data structures. The segmentation faults prevent further meaningful evaluation or analysis of the program state. To proceed, it would be necessary to investigate the construction and initialization of `FC1.Preheader` earlier in the program execution to identify potential issues.
